images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese gravure idol with flawless skin texture and visible pores, embodying a "Zen and peaceful" mood amidst a snowy forest. She is captured from a drone aerial view, lying on the pristine white snow in a trendy, form-fitting tennis skirt set featuring a tight white polo and short pleated skirt that accentuates her slim waist and curvy figure. Her straight black silky hair is styled in a messy, bedhead look, framing her cute yet seductive face as she gazes up with a relaxed, lazy expression. She is casually flipping through a book or magazine resting on her chest, the soft overcast sky light illuminating the scene with bright, clear clarity. The background is a blur of snow-covered trees, rendered in a cinematic Teal and Orange color grade. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
